summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Employee Review System with Laravel backend. All core features working: Admin/PM/Employee login, Admin Management (multi-admin), PM My Reviews, Annual Bonus Payable, Dashboard stats, and all CRUD APIs.

minor.issue: Validation errors return 200 with redirect HTML instead of proper 400/422 JSON response - likely Laravel validation redirect behavior

issues: React useEffect dependency warnings in console - not affecting functionality

action_items: Consider fixing Laravel validation to return JSON errors instead of redirects for API routes (minor)
seed_data_creation: Test data already seeded - 10 employees, 72 internal reviews, 45 published finals, 3 annual bonus records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Laravel backend on port 8001 (PHP artisan serve). All new features (PM My Reviews, Admin Management, Annual Bonus) are fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_laravel_api.py cover all major endpoints.

features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats: 10 employees, 72 reviews, 45 finals
features_tested.admin_management_page: PASS - Lists admins, Create Admin dialog works
features_tested.pm_my_reviews_page: PASS - Shows cumulative score, bonus bracket, reviews list
features_tested.annual_bonus_page: PASS - Shows 3 records, Calculate Bonuses button works
